text.title: Meta Ads Reporting and Diagnosis Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observable signals. Every leaf points to a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Are ≥50 conv/wk AND CAPI live AND last week's data complete?

text.example: preconds=true (62 conv/wk, CAPI green) → run full report → 3 actions queued.
